info.title: CryptoSharia API
info.description:
API for CryptoSharia Ecosystem
OpenAPI Spec: openapi.json

ApiKeyAuth.name: Api-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API Key for authenticated access to CryptoSharia Ecosystem services.

BearerAuth.description: JWT Bearer token for user authentication.

AuthSignupPostResponse.description: Successful signup response with user info

token.description: The verification token received via email

AuthSigninPostResponse.description: Successful signin response with tokens and user info

role.description: The programmatic name of the assigned role

AuthMeGetResponse.description: Successful retrieval of current user info

total.description: Total number of items matching the filters

tags.description: List of tag identifiers (UUID or slug) to attach to this post
List of tag identifiers (UUID or slug) to attach to this post
List of tag identifiers (UUID or slug) to attach to this token
List of tag identifiers (UUID or slug) to attach to this token

get.description: Documentation page for the CryptoSharia API using Scalar.
Retrieve the OpenAPI 3.1.0 specification for this API.

post.description: Register a new **regular user** (`role: member`) account. Users must verify their email before they can sign in.

schema.description: Whether to trigger a verification email

parameters.description: Whether to trigger a verification email
parameters.name: notify

500.description: Failed to register user

post.description: Verify a user email address using a secret token.

500.description: Failed to verify email

post.description: Request a password reset email. Always returns a generic success response.

schema.description: Whether to trigger a password reset email

parameters.description: Whether to trigger a password reset email
parameters.name: notify

200.description: If your email is registered, a reset link has been sent

500.description: Failed to process password reset request

post.description: Reset password using a valid one-time reset token.

500.description: Failed to reset password

post.description: Authenticate with email and password. Returns access and refresh tokens.

200.description: Success, tokens and user metadata returned

500.description: Failed to process signin

post.description: Revoke a refresh token to end a session.

500.description: Failed to revoke token

post.description: Rotate refresh token and issue a new access token.

200.description: Success, new tokens and user metadata returned

401.description: Refresh token is expired or revoked

500.description: Failed to refresh token

get.description: Retrieve profile information for the currently authenticated user.

500.description: Failed to fetch user profile

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all users. Requires permission: `users.read`.

schema.description: Search by name or email

parameters.description: Search by name or email
parameters.name: search

schema.description:
List of role names to filter by.
Example: admin,member

parameters.description:
List of role names to filter by.
Example: admin,member
parameters.name: roles

schema.description:
List of account statuses to filter by.
Example: active,suspended

parameters.description:
List of account statuses to filter by.
Example: active,suspended
parameters.name: statuses

200.description: Paginated list of users retrieved successfully

500.description: Failed to retrieve users due to an internal server error

get.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific user. Requires permission: `users.read` or ownership.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to view this user

500.description: Failed to retrieve user details due to an internal server error

patch.description: Update an existing user profile. Requires permission: `users.update` or ownership.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to update this user

500.description: Failed to update user due to an internal server error

put.description: Update the administrative status of a user (lifecycle management). Requires permission: `users.manage_status`

403.description: Insufficient permissions to manage user status

500.description: Failed to update status

put.description: Assign or remove a role for a user. Requires permission: `users.manage_role`.

403.description: Insufficient permissions to manage user roles

500.description: Failed to assign role due to an internal server error

get.description:
Retrieve a list of posts with filtering, searching, and pagination support.
Note: Guests/members requesting non-published statuses will receive a 403 Forbidden.

schema.description:
List of content statuses to filter by.
Example: published,draft

parameters.description:
List of content statuses to filter by.
Example: published,draft
parameters.name: statuses

schema.description:
List of post sections to filter by.
Example: news,education,activity

parameters.description:
List of post sections to filter by.
Example: news,education,activity
parameters.name: sections

schema.description:
List of post types to filter by.
Example: article,video,webinar

parameters.description:
List of post types to filter by.
Example: article,video,webinar
parameters.name: types

schema.description:
List of post slugs to filter by.
Example: this-is-a-post,this-is-another-post

parameters.description:
List of post slugs to filter by.
Example: this-is-a-post,this-is-another-post
parameters.name: slugs

schema.description:
List of post slugs to exclude.
Example: this-is-a-post,this-is-another-post

parameters.description:
List of post slugs to exclude.
Example: this-is-a-post,this-is-another-post
parameters.name: exclude

schema.description:
List of tag slugs to filter by.
Example: education,halal

parameters.description:
List of tag slugs to filter by.
Example: education,halal
parameters.name: tags

200.description: Paginated list of posts retrieved successfully

403.description: Explicitly requesting non-published statuses without permission

500.description: Failed to retrieve posts due to an internal server error

post.description: Create a post and optionally set tag relations. Values in `tags` can be tag UUIDs or slugs.

409.description: Post with this slug already exists

500.description: Failed to create post due to an internal server error

get.description: Retrieve a single post using its UUID or Slug. Support for draft preview is automatically handled based on user permissions.

schema.description: The UUID or Slug of the post

parameters.description: The UUID or Slug of the post
parameters.name: id

500.description: Failed to retrieve post due to an internal server error

patch.description: Update an existing post by UUID or Slug. When `tags` is provided, the existing post tags are replaced.

schema.description: The UUID or Slug of the post

parameters.description: The UUID or Slug of the post
parameters.name: id

409.description: Post with this slug already exists

500.description: Failed to update post due to an internal server error

delete.description: Delete a post by UUID or Slug.

schema.description: The UUID or Slug of the post

parameters.description: The UUID or Slug of the post
parameters.name: id

500.description: Failed to delete post due to an internal server error

get.description:
Retrieve a list of cryptocurrency tokens with filtering, searching, and pagination support.
Note: Guests/members requesting non-published statuses will receive a 403 Forbidden.

schema.description:
List of content statuses to filter by.
Example: published,draft

parameters.description:
List of content statuses to filter by.
Example: published,draft
parameters.name: statuses

schema.description:
List of sharia statuses to filter by.
Example: halal,haram

parameters.description:
List of sharia statuses to filter by.
Example: halal,haram
parameters.name: shariaStatuses

schema.description:
List of token slugs to filter by.
Example: bitcoin,ethereum,sui

parameters.description:
List of token slugs to filter by.
Example: bitcoin,ethereum,sui
parameters.name: slugs

schema.description:
List of token slugs to exclude.
Example: bitcoin,ethereum,sui

parameters.description:
List of token slugs to exclude.
Example: bitcoin,ethereum,sui
parameters.name: exclude

schema.description:
List of tag slugs to filter by.
Example: defi,platform

parameters.description:
List of tag slugs to filter by.
Example: defi,platform
parameters.name: tags

200.description: Paginated list of tokens retrieved successfully

403.description: Explicitly requesting non-published statuses without permission

500.description: Failed to retrieve tokens due to an internal server error

post.description: Create a token and optionally set tag relations. Values in `tags` can be tag UUIDs or slugs.

409.description: Token with this slug or ticker already exists

500.description: Failed to create token due to an internal server error

get.description: Retrieve a single cryptocurrency token using its UUID or Slug. Support for draft preview is automatically handled based on user permissions.

schema.description: The UUID or Slug of the cryptocurrency token

parameters.description: The UUID or Slug of the cryptocurrency token
parameters.name: id

500.description: Failed to retrieve token due to an internal server error

patch.description: Update an existing token by UUID or Slug. When `tags` is provided, existing token tags are replaced.

schema.description: The UUID or Slug of the cryptocurrency token

parameters.description: The UUID or Slug of the cryptocurrency token
parameters.name: id

409.description: Token with this slug or ticker already exists

500.description: Failed to update token due to an internal server error

delete.description: Delete a token by UUID or Slug.

schema.description: The UUID or Slug of the cryptocurrency token

parameters.description: The UUID or Slug of the cryptocurrency token
parameters.name: id

500.description: Failed to delete token due to an internal server error

get.description: Fetch real-time quotes and market data for specific tokens from CoinMarketCap.

schema.description:
List of token slugs to get quotes for.
Example: bitcoin,ethereum,sui

parameters.description:
List of token slugs to get quotes for.
Example: bitcoin,ethereum,sui
parameters.name: slugs

500.description: Failed to retrieve token quotes due to an internal server error

502.description: Failed to fetch data from market data provider

get.description: Retrieve a list of tags with filtering, searching, and pagination support.

schema.description:
List of tag slugs to filter by.
Example: halal,defi

parameters.description:
List of tag slugs to filter by.
Example: halal,defi
parameters.name: slugs

200.description: Paginated list of tags retrieved successfully

500.description: Failed to retrieve tags due to an internal server error

post.description: Create a new tag with name, slug, and optional description.

409.description: Tag with this name or slug already exists

500.description: Failed to create tag due to an internal server error

get.description: Retrieve a single tag using its UUID or Slug.

schema.description: The UUID or Slug of the tag

parameters.description: The UUID or Slug of the tag
parameters.name: id

500.description: Failed to retrieve tag due to an internal server error

patch.description: Update an existing tag by UUID or Slug.

schema.description: The UUID or Slug of the tag

parameters.description: The UUID or Slug of the tag
parameters.name: id

409.description: Tag with this name or slug already exists

500.description: Failed to update tag due to an internal server error

delete.description: Delete a tag by UUID or Slug. By default, returns 409 if the tag is still in use by posts or tokens. Use force=true to delete anyway.

schema.description: The UUID or Slug of the tag

parameters.description: The UUID or Slug of the tag
parameters.name: id

schema.description: Force delete even if tag is in use

parameters.description: Force delete even if tag is in use
parameters.name: force

500.description: Failed to delete tag due to an internal server error

get.description: Retrieve a list of messages with support for search, sender filtering, and pagination.

schema.description:
List of sender emails to filter by.
Example: example1@gmail.com,example2@gmail.com

parameters.description:
List of sender emails to filter by.
Example: example1@gmail.com,example2@gmail.com
parameters.name: senders

200.description: Paginated list of messages retrieved successfully

500.description: Failed to retrieve messages due to an internal server error

post.description: Create a new message from the contact form.

schema.description: Whether to trigger an external notification (e.g. email)

parameters.description: Whether to trigger an external notification (e.g. email)
parameters.name: notify

500.description: Failed to send message due to an internal server error

get.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific message. Requires permission: `messages.read`.

500.description: Failed to retrieve message details due to an internal server error

post.description: Proxies an image upload to the ImgBB service. Only image files (JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, HEIC, etc.) are accepted, with a maximum size of 32MB. Requires `posts.manage` or `tokens.manage` permission.

schema.description: Multipart form-data payload. Must include a file part named 'file' (max 32MB, image/* MIME types only).

400.description: Invalid request: missing image, unsupported file type, or exceeds 32MB limit

500.description: Failed to process image upload due to an internal server error

502.description: Failed to proxy upload to ImgBB service

post.description: Uploads a file (max 4MB) to Vercel Blob and stores its metadata in the assets table. Requires `posts.manage` or `tokens.manage` permission.

schema.description: Multipart form-data payload. Must include a file part named 'file' (max 4MB).

400.description: Invalid request: missing file, empty file, or file exceeds 4MB

500.description: Failed to process asset upload due to an internal server error

502.description: Failed to upload asset to storage provider

post.description: Remove orphaned Vercel Blob assets not referenced by posts, tokens, or user avatars. Requires Api-Key equal to CS_API_KEY_OPS.

401.description: Invalid or missing Api-Key for ops endpoints

500.description: Failed to clean up orphan assets due to an internal server error

post.description: Initialize the database with sample data (Users, Posts, Tokens, Messages) for development and testing. **WARNING: This will wipe out all existing data.**

403.description: Demo seeding is strictly forbidden in production

500.description: Failed to seed demo data
